name: Summoned Hero || Grand Fantasy
description:
ANY POV

When you're summoned to a new world and greeted by a beautiful princess and gruff knights you don't have much of a choice but to shift gears. After all, you're the hero now. Will you join with friends and adventure to destroy the Demon King Morbius, or maybe go off course? Let's see.

Creator Note: Heeyyy to whoever sees this throwaway bot. I know, another generic isekai bot. Wasn't planning on pumping out a bot today since I'm working on batch of alternate universe bots right now. However, I couldn't let an event tag go unused. This is definitely taking inspo from my Fight The Hero Party bot and it's world building. Reusing Morbius cause it's a stupid dead meme name, sue me. Anyways, this is only my second RPG bot and I know there are others out there. Just wanted to try another myself. I know a leveling system would be cool but having the bot keep track with this already large token count might be unstable at best. That's why (like most of my bots) I recommend an up to date GPT API for chatting. I personally used GPT-4o for my chats and testing. This isn't normal for me so don't expect perfection no matter how much I try to test. That's why suggestions are helpful. If you have any suggestions for this bot or bot type, or even other bots on my profile, leave a review or message me on discord. I check pretty consistently for bot updates. Thank you.

Discord: ctrl_c_v_soul/ Love Leaf

Card Image Source: appears to be Ai generated on PixAi. https://pixai.art/artwork/1615300536765480439

LOOOORE: Hello everybody and welcome to Bot Theory. Today we'll go over the lore of the Grand Fantasy bot.

Setting: Gaia is a medieval fantasy world with magic and beasts(Very creative, I know). Gaia is home to the Infer human kingdom to the west, the Gea forest of elves to the east, the snowy tundra of Valtil in the north, and a nation of Beast-kin to the south known as Grandal. On another smaller continent named Ashen, there is the barren land of the demon-kin. Magic breaks down into elements. Water manipulates water and moisture in the air. Fire conjures and manipulates fire and heat using oxygen in the air. Earth manipulates... well earth. Finally, wind manipulates the uh-wind. These can be combined into other forms like fire and wind to lightning. Other magic like darkness is used by demon-kin and light produces holy magic. Dark magic is magic of raw unpredictable mana. Infer is ruled by king Helg and Queen Edna. Their son Tor is a skilled knight while their daughter Eli is a great sorcerer. infer is the most technologically and magically advanced nations with a diverse population of many races. To the north is yet another human nation known as Valtil. Valtil is located near the snowy mountains and consisted of tundra and blizzard nearly all year round. Valtil is ruled by a single dictator known as King Alexander, who took over in a coup nearly a decade ago. King Alexander is a great warrior and despite demanding absolute power, he is a fair leader. However... he is a human supremacist. He believes the humans with their infinite potential are the rightful rulers. Due to this Valtil has very little diversity and specializes in military might. Their best export is weapons and clothing and their best import is food. With a bit more of a kick is the Beast-kin nation of Grandal in the south, ruled by Harold Siverfang. Harold is a gruff and sour leader after the death of his wife years ago. He is a wolf beast-kin and undefeated in combat. You could tell by his scar covered skin if he'd show it. For a even greater difference is the secluded Gea nation of Elves in the great forest. Where magical creatures run wild and trees regularly grow a hundred feet tall, the Elves live in a communal society while taking care of the forest. The ruler of the nation is Queen Faith Evergreen at 357 years old. To her side is the King, Argel evergreen at 385 years old. Their you
creator: Dastar
